zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Somerville於1385年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾紐比吉時，她的父親John Somerville40歲，母親Margaret Edmonston35歲。她於1397年與Robert Dalzeil結婚。她去世於1430年在蘇格蘭登巴頓史爾度巴頓享年45歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Somerville于1385年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾紐比吉时，她的父亲John Somerville40岁，母亲Margaret Edmonston35岁。她于1397年与Robert Dalzeil结婚。她去世于1430年在苏格兰登巴頓史爾度巴頓享年45岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Somerville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Graveron-Sémerville in Eure (Normandy), from the ancient Germanic personal name Sigimar (see Siemer ) + Old French ville ‘settlement’. The surname was taken to Scotland in the 12th century by William de Somerville, a retainer of David, Earl of Huntingdon, who became King David I of Scotland.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Somacháin (see Summers ) or Mag Shamradháin (see Somers ).

variants.name: Siemer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Helmuth, Otto, Theresia.
German: from the ancient Germanic personal name Siegmar, composed of the elements sigi ‘victory’ + mari, meri ‘famous’.

variants.name: Summerville
meanings: English, Scottish (Lanarkshire), and Irish: variant of   Somerville  . This form of the surname is particularly common in Ireland.

variants.name: Simrell
meanings: Scottish: perhaps related to the Ulster nameSumeril, a variant of Somerville .

variants.name: Summerfield
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old English sumor ‘summer’ + feld ‘field, open land’, denoting summer pasture or fields cultivated only in summer, such as Summerfield in Woodnesborough (Kent), Somerfield Court in Sellindge (Kent), and Summerfield in Marlborough (Wiltshire).
Americanized form (translation into English) of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Sommerfeld  , a cognate of 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Somerville was born in 1385, in Newbigging, Lanarkshire, Scotland, her father, John Somerville, was 40 and her mother, Margaret Edmonston, was 35. She married Robert Dalzeil in 1397. She died in 1430, in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, at the age of 45, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Somerville est née en 1385, à Newbigging, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, John Somerville, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret Edmonston, avait 35 ans. Elle a épousé Robert Dalzeil en 1397. Elle est décédée en 1430, à Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 45 ans, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Somerville 1385 in Newbigging, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Somerville 40 und ihre Mutter Margaret Edmonston 35. Sie hat 1397 Robert Dalzeil geheiratet. Sie starb 1430 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Somerville è nata il nel 1385 nel Newbigging, Lanarkshire, Scotland, sua padre, John Somerville, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Margaret Edmonston, aveva 35 anni. Lei sposato Robert Dalzeil nel 1397. Morì nel 1430, nel Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, all'età di 45 anni, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Somervilleが1385年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアニュービグジングで生まれた時，父John Somervilleは40歳，母Margaret Edmonstonは35歳であった。1397年にRobert Dalzeilと結婚した。彼女は1430年にスコットランドダンバートンシュアイアダンバートンで45歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Somerville(이)가 1385년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 뉴비긴그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Somerville(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Edmonston(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1397년 Robert Dalzeil(와)과 결혼했다. 그녀는 1430년 스컷랜드 던바토실르 드바턴에서 45세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Somerville nasceu em 1385, em Newbigging, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, John Somerville, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Edmonston, tinha 35 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert Dalzeil em 1397. Ela faleceu em 1430, em Dumbarton, Dunbartonshire, Scotland, com 45 anos, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Somerville родилась в 1385 г. в местности нюбигинг, ланаркшир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени John Somerville было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Edmonston, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert Dalzeil в 1397 г. Она умерла в 1430 г. в местности думбартон, дунбартоншир, Шотландия в возрасте 45 лет и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.
